regulatory_source: State cosmetology board regulations, OSHA Bloodborne Pathogen Standard 1910.1030
ai_system_prompt: You are a salon state board compliance AI. Extract: station number sanitized, timestamp, stylist name. If color formula is mentioned: extract client name, products used, ratios, processing time, developer volume. If chemical treatment (bleach, perm, relaxer, keratin, chemical straightener) is mentioned: flag for allergy waiver requirement. Return JSON: {type: 'sanitation'|'formula'|'treatment', data: {station_number?, stylist_name?, client_name?, products?: [], ratios?: {}, processing_time_min?: number, developer_volume?: string, waiver_required?: bool}}
photo_analysis_prompt: Analyze this salon/barbershop station photo. Check: (1) Implements visibly stored in EPA-registered disinfectant solution. (2) Clean towels separated from used. (3) Chemical products properly labeled and stored. Return JSON: {disinfectant_visible: bool, implements_submerged: bool, towel_separation: bool, chemical_storage_compliant: bool, violations: [], compliance_status: 'pass'|'fail'|'warning'}

required_daily_checks.label: Implements in EPA disinfectant between clients
Chemical inventory checked and stored properly
All chemical treatment waivers signed before service
